_readme: Curated index of popular Claude Code skills. EDIT THIS FILE to add/remove skills or change stack mappings. Verified against the GitHub API on 2026-06-23. 'type' is one of: marketplace (claude plugin), skills-cli (npx skills add), manual (clone/copy). recommend-skills.py reads this file.

superpowers.install: claude plugin marketplace add obra/superpowers && claude plugin install superpowers@superpowers-dev
superpowers.purpose: Disciplined engineering workflow: brainstorm -> plan -> execute with strict red/green/refactor TDD.
superpowers.note: Broader than a plain TDD loop; overlaps the local 'tdd' skill.

ponytail.install: claude plugin marketplace add DietrichGebert/ponytail && claude plugin install ponytail@ponytail
ponytail.purpose: Makes the agent write minimalist code via a 'lazy senior dev' decision ladder (YAGNI -> stdlib -> existing dep).

anthropic-skills.install: claude plugin marketplace add anthropics/skills && claude plugin install example-skills@anthropic-agent-skills
anthropic-skills.purpose: Official Anthropic skills. example-skills bundles skill-creator, webapp-testing, frontend-design, mcp-builder, etc.
anthropic-skills.note: Also ships document-skills (docx/pdf/pptx/xlsx) and claude-api. The user already has the document skills.

addy-agent-skills.purpose: Addy Osmani's production-grade general engineering skills.
addy-agent-skills.note: Marketplace already registered globally on this machine (known_marketplaces.json).

wshobson-agents.install: claude plugin marketplace add wshobson/agents && claude plugin install comprehensive-review@claude-code-workflows
wshobson-agents.purpose: Large workflow marketplace (50 plugins): code review, refactoring, docs/ADR, API, k8s, security, observability.
wshobson-agents.note: 50 plugins total. Curated default enables review/refactor/docs; browse for api-scaffolding, kubernetes-operations, security-scanning, c4-architecture, tdd-workflows, etc.

solid.purpose: Senior-engineer-quality code via SOLID, TDD, value objects, Law of Demeter.
solid.note: Explicitly requested. WARNING: no license file and ~2 months stale; the user also has a local 'solid' skill.

cc-skills-golang.purpose: 45-skill Go suite: idioms, code style, error handling, testing, concurrency, project layout, popular libs.
cc-skills-golang.note: Installs a suite; the 'skills' list above are the highest-value ones for this user's clean-arch/DDD Go work.

spring-boot.install: Clone the repo and copy its .claude/ skills into your project, or use it as a Spring Boot project template.
spring-boot.purpose: Spring Boot / JPA best-practice skills + template by Piotr Minkowski.
spring-boot.note: Manual: it's a template project (has pom.xml + CLAUDE.md + .claude/), not a one-command marketplace install.

jeffallan-skills.install: claude plugin marketplace add Jeffallan/claude-skills && claude plugin install fullstack-dev-skills@fullstack-dev-skills
jeffallan-skills.purpose: 66-skill collection incl. django-expert (Django 5/DRF), fastapi-patterns (async, uv, DI), api-designer (OpenAPI 3.1).
jeffallan-skills.note: One plugin bundles all 66 skills; multi-stack (also has Next.js, Flutter, Java).

vercel-react.purpose: Official Vercel React/Next.js best-practice skills (70 rules across 8 categories).
vercel-react.note: Also ships react-native-skills, react-view-transitions, vercel-optimize, web-design-guidelines.

angular.purpose: Official Angular team skills: architectural guidance (Signals, Signal Forms) + new-app scaffolding.
angular.note: Official; angular.dev docs point here. Skills live at repo root (angular-developer/, angular-new-app/).

ui-ux-pro-max.install: claude plugin marketplace add nextlevelbuilder/ui-ux-pro-max-skill && claude plugin install ui-ux-pro-max@ui-ux-pro-max-skill
ui-ux-pro-max.purpose: Design-intelligence DBs: 67 UI styles, 161 palettes, 57 font pairings, 99 UX guidelines, chart types.
ui-ux-pro-max.note: Explicitly requested. Complements 'frontend-design'. Also has a uipro-cli.

vgv-flutter.purpose: Flutter/Dart best-practice skills by Very Good Ventures (architecture, bloc, testing, theming, a11y).
vgv-flutter.note: Repo name says 'plugin' but it is skills-cli format (skills/ dir with 14 skills).

k8s.install: claude plugin marketplace add LukasNiessen/kubernetes-skill && claude plugin install kubernetes-skill@kubernetes-skill
k8s.purpose: Grounds K8s/Helm answers in official best practices; anti-hallucination.
k8s.note: General K8s/Helm; for operator authoring see k8s-operator.

k8s-operator.install: claude plugin marketplace add Sagart-cactus/claude-k8s-plugin && claude plugin install k8s@sagart-devtools
k8s-operator.purpose: Scaffolds CRD operators with Kubebuilder + controller-runtime + Tilt loop. Closest match to this user's operator work.
k8s-operator.note: Low adoption (34 stars); included because it specifically matches kubebuilder/controller-runtime operator development.

terraform.purpose: Production Terraform/OpenTofu patterns, module structure, testing, CI/CD, by Anton Babenko.
terraform.note: Authoritative author (maintainer of the terraform-aws-modules ecosystem).

hashicorp.install: claude plugin marketplace add hashicorp/agent-skills && claude plugin install terraform-code-generation@hashicorp
hashicorp.purpose: Official HashiCorp skills for generating/validating Terraform HCL and modules (+ Packer).
hashicorp.note: Plugins are terraform + packer focused (terraform-code-generation, terraform-module-generation, terraform-provider-development, packer-builders, packer-hcp). No dedicated Vault plugin despite the user using Vault.

trailofbits-sec.install: claude plugin marketplace add trailofbits/skills && claude plugin install static-analysis@trailofbits
trailofbits-sec.purpose: Trail of Bits security/audit skills: static analysis, Semgrep rules, variant analysis, secure-contracts.
trailofbits-sec.note: 40-plugin marketplace; also has modern-python, c-review, property-based-testing, supply-chain-risk-auditor, mutation-testing.

owasp.install: Clone the repo and copy .claude/skills/ into your project (or ~/.claude/skills).
owasp.purpose: OWASP Top 10:2025 + ASVS 5.0 + language-specific security quirks.
owasp.note: Manual: skill lives under .claude/ (no plugin marketplace). Complements trailofbits-sec with a current OWASP checklist.

gaps: Docker: no strong popular dedicated skill (best is ~8 stars). Use the multi-stack collections (jeffallan-skills) + CLAUDE.md conventions.
OpenTelemetry app-instrumentation: only o11y-dev/opentelemetry-skill (~29 stars); most 'otel' repos monitor Claude Code itself, not your app.
Kafka / event-driven: no strong popular skill found.
Go DDD / clean-architecture (dedicated): only 1-star repos match exactly; rely on cc-skills-golang + superpowers + CLAUDE.md.
